question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/MonitorApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged user inject --server.error.include-binding-errors=always via args to SpringApplication.run(), causing validation binding errors (which may reveal property names and expected formats for sensitive configuration like operator.privateKey) to be exposed in HTTP error responses?
